def negative_python_perf_layer_data_structure_choice_dict_of_dicts_for_fixed_records():
    rule_id = "python_perf_layer_data_structure_choice_dict_of_dicts_for_fixed_records"
    family = "performance"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Layer: Data structure choice. Flag dict-of-dicts records in hot loops where dataclass, tuple, or typed containers reduce lookup cost."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
